summary: Completed frontend testing of new payment result pages (PaymentSuccess and PaymentFailed). All features working correctly: full-page success/failed routes render properly, navigation buttons work, mobile responsiveness verified, checkout page with Razorpay loads correctly, weather API returns real Open-Meteo data.
critical_code_review_comments: PaymentSuccess.jsx correctly renders success icon, heading, invoice notice, and Shop Again button with proper data-testid attributes
PaymentFailed.jsx correctly renders failure icon, empathetic message ('Don't worry, no amount has been deducted...'), Try Again and Back to Store buttons
Both pages show Estate Tea branding header
Order details card only shows when route state is passed (correct behavior)
Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844 viewport - all elements visible and buttons fit within viewport
Checkout page correctly shows Razorpay button and 'Payment didn't go through?' link
Weather API uses real Open-Meteo data (Bangalore: 32°C, Partly Cloudy)
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 tested new payment result pages: 1) /payment-success renders with success-icon, success-heading, invoice-notice, shop-again-button (all data-testids verified), 2) /payment-failed renders with failure-icon, failure-heading, empathetic message, try-again-button, back-to-store-button, 3) Shop Again navigates to / (entry form), 4) Back to Store navigates to / (entry form), 5) Try Again navigates to /checkout (redirects to / if no session), 6) Mobile responsiveness verified at 390x844, 7) Checkout page loads with Razorpay button and payment-trouble-link, 8) Weather API returns real data from Open-Meteo.

features_tested.payment_success_page_desktop: PASS - All elements visible: success-icon, success-heading, invoice-notice, shop-again-button
features_tested.payment_success_page_mobile: PASS - All elements visible and fit within 390px viewport
features_tested.payment_success_order_details: PASS - Order details card correctly NOT shown without route state
features_tested.payment_failed_page_desktop: PASS - All elements visible: failure-icon, failure-heading, empathetic message, try-again-button, back-to-store-button
features_tested.payment_failed_page_mobile: PASS - All elements visible and fit within 390px viewport
features_tested.payment_failed_empathetic_message: PASS - 'Don't worry, no amount has been deducted...' message present
features_tested.payment_failed_try_again_nav: PASS - Navigates to /checkout (redirects to / without session)
features_tested.entry_form_functional: PASS - Name input and submit work correctly
features_tested.store_page_functional: PASS - Products, variant selection, add to cart work
features_tested.checkout_page_razorpay: PASS - Razorpay button container present, order summary visible
features_tested.checkout_payment_trouble_link: PASS - 'Payment didn't go through?' link visible
features_tested.weather_api_real_data: PASS - Returns real Open-Meteo data (Bangalore: 32°C, Partly Cloudy)
